tool_args.label: NYC DOT Transit Signal Priority Expansion

payload.description: NYC DOT expansion of Transit Signal Priority (TSP) technology to speed MTA buses. TSP was active on 5 SBS routes at 260 intersections as of July 2017, with plans to reach nearly 500 intersections on 10 routes by end of 2017, and additional 550 intersections (about 10 routes) by end of 2020.

evidence_refs.source_quote: TSP has since grown to 260 intersections along five different Select Bus Service routes
By the end of 2017, TSP will be implemented at nearly 500 intersections
NYC DOT will accelerate its implementation of TSP, expanding the network by an additional 550 intersections (about 10 routes) by end of 2020

tool_args.label: TSP began in 2006 on Victory Boulevard, Staten Island

payload.claim_text: Starting in 2006, DOT, in coordination with MTA New York City Transit, began using TSP along Victory Boulevard on Staten Island

evidence_refs.source_quote: Starting in 2006, DOT, in coordination with Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA) New York City Transit, began using TSP along Victory Boulevard on Staten Island

tool_args.label: Citywide TSP expansion began in 2012

payload.claim_text: After developing a more robust centralized TSP system, citywide expansion began in 2012
payload.description: Citywide TSP expansion started in 2012 after developing centralized system

evidence_refs.source_quote: citywide expansion began in 2012

tool_args.label: TSP complements all-door boarding and dedicated bus lanes

payload.claim_text: TSP is also one tool that works well with other measures to improve bus speeds, such as all-door boarding, and dedicated bus lanes
payload.description: TSP works well with all-door boarding and dedicated bus lanes

evidence_refs.source_quote: TSP is also one tool that works well with other measures to improve bus speeds, such as all-door boarding, and dedicated bus lanes

tool_args.label: TSP most beneficial on two-way streets outside Manhattan

payload.claim_text: TSP is most beneficial on two-way streets outside Manhattan, and when a full substantive traffic analysis underlies the work to maximize safety and transportation benefits
payload.description: TSP optimal deployment conditions

evidence_refs.source_quote: TSP is most beneficial on two-way streets outside Manhattan, and when a full substantive traffic analysis underlies the work to maximize safety and transportation benefits

tool_args.label: TSP improved bus travel times without harming general traffic

payload.claim_text: Travel times for buses have improved while other vehicles traveling along the same bus routes have also seen travel times stay constant or even improve
payload.description: No negative impact on general traffic travel times from TSP

evidence_refs.source_quote: Travel times for buses have improved while other vehicles traveling along the same bus routes have also seen travel times stay constant or even improve
